objective: Integrate a minimal custom CUDA affine warp kernel into the MMAPI pitch-linear NV12_ER scratch stage under frozen Regular05 semantics, starting from identity and stopping on any visual corruption.

entry_context.project_positioning: Jetson Orin NX heterogeneous video compute and device-side dataflow optimization, with EIS as the representative workload.
entry_context.quality_anchor: resid_r15_s07 remains the accepted Regular-gate stabilization-strength anchor and is not changed in this loop.
entry_context.previous_safety_result: cuda_mmapi_interop_safety_verifier_v1 passed identity/marker/dynamic_marker diagnostic writes with rc=0 and readable output; large-plane shift/dynamic_shift was rejected for tearing.
entry_context.current_question: Can a custom CUDA affine kernel safely replace the marker-only diagnostic inside the same MMAPI scratch boundary and produce readable identity, translate, static affine, and dynamic affine outputs?
entry_context.claim_boundary: Device-stage CUDA affine diagnostic only. No EIS quality improvement, no zero-copy, no full real-time EIS, and no accepted acceleration claim until same-input timing and visual checks pass.

frozen_variables: Keep MMAPI main chain block-linear NV12 and scratch pitch-linear NV12_ER
Do not change resid_r15_s07 or CPU EIS quality semantics
Do not use the rejected large-plane shift/dynamic_shift verifier as a pass condition
Identity kernel must pass before translate
Translate must pass before static affine
Static affine must pass before dynamic affine
No EIS quality claim from diagnostic outputs

result.decision: Blocked at the translate/non-identity stage. The identity CUDA kernel path runs and produces readable output, but translate/affine/random-sampling CUDA kernels over the current EGL-mapped pitch-linear NV12_ER scratch produce severe tearing/distortion. A NvBufSurfaceSyncForDevice attempt on the CUDA output scratch caused a segmentation fault, matching earlier evidence that this sync route is not a usable fix in this path.
rejected_translate_attempts: direct EGL output write with affine kernel
temporary cudaMallocPitch input/output buffers plus copy-back
matrix passed as kernel parameters instead of constant memory
NvBufSurfaceSyncForDevice on output scratch, which segfaulted
result.claim_boundary: Negative device-stage CUDA affine integration evidence. Do not claim accepted MMAPI CUDA affine warp, acceleration, zero-copy, full real-time EIS, or EIS quality improvement.

task_queue.title: Control-plane registration
task_queue.objective: Register this active contract and verify onboarding, doctor, and gate boundaries.
success_criteria: onboard reports this active task contract while running

task_queue.title: Patch and build CUDA affine sample
task_queue.objective: Patch a fresh MMAPI sample with a CUDA .cu kernel object and minimal C++ bridge.
success_criteria: sample links without system package changes
stop_reasons: fresh MMAPI sample markers are incompatible with a focused patch
CUDA/MMAPI compile or link failure cannot be fixed without broad environment changes

task_queue.title: Identity kernel run
task_queue.objective: Run the custom CUDA affine kernel in identity mode and compare against source.
success_criteria: visual review shows no tearing, green output, or wrong color
source-vs-identity diff stays near codec/dataflow floor
stop_reasons: identity output is unreadable or green

task_queue.title: Translate kernel run
task_queue.objective: Run a small translate affine mode using per-pixel sampling rather than large-plane copy.
success_criteria: visual review shows coherent geometry, not block tearing
stop_reasons: translate output repeats the old large-plane tearing failure
visual review shows block corruption rather than geometric border

task_queue.title: Static affine kernel run
task_queue.objective: Run a small rotate/scale/translate affine mode and compare against reference expectations.
success_criteria: visual review shows coherent affine warp
stop_reasons: static affine tears or becomes unreadable
affine direction is wrong and cannot be fixed after one focused convention check

task_queue.title: Dynamic affine kernel run
task_queue.objective: Run per-frame affine parameters to prove dynamic CUDA warp execution inside MMAPI scratch.
success_criteria: per-frame parameters are visible in logs
visual review shows coherent dynamic affine motion, not tearing
stop_reasons: dynamic affine tears or becomes unreadable
per-frame update path fails after static affine passed

task_queue.title: Stage comparison
task_queue.objective: Compare CUDA affine diagnostic timing with VPI dynamic Remap rebuild and existing PerspectiveWarp stage boundaries.
success_criteria: comparison names source, mode, frame count, and stage scope
no full-pipeline acceleration claim is made from diagnostic timing
small gains or lack of gains are both explained

task_queue.title: Optional Regular05 matrix replay
task_queue.objective: Only if identity/translate/static/dynamic affine are visually clean, try source_to_dest matrix replay for Regular05.
success_criteria: result is classified as device-stage replay, not full real-time EIS
stop_reasons: earlier affine modes are not clean
result has tearing or unexplainable black-border regression

task_queue.title: Evidence closeout
task_queue.objective: Write measured result, negative boundaries, exact evidence paths, and next contract suggestion.
success_criteria: README/presentation/evidence routing are updated only where useful
long-term context is updated with high-signal result only
review assets are copied to the categorized Windows review tree

task_queue.title: Final validation and commit readiness
task_queue.objective: Run harness, JSON, diff, secret, and artifact checks, then commit coherent source/config/docs changes.
success_criteria: large artifacts and secrets remain untracked
commit message trailer policy is followed

forbidden_claims: full-pipeline acceleration from diagnostic timing alone
accepted CUDA MMAPI path without visual review
stop_reasons: Jetson SSH or device access is unavailable and cannot be recovered locally
identity kernel output is unreadable, green, or visibly torn
CUDA affine sample requires broad MMAPI rewrite before a minimal verifier
local and public knowledge cannot classify a CUDA/MMAPI blocker
